base_prompt: Create a professional lifestyle product photograph showing the item from the provided image in a realistic, styled setting. Use bright photorealistic lighting, sharp focus, high-end aesthetic. Keep the logo on the item EXACTLY the same.

Shower Benches.prompt: Modern luxury bathroom shower with water droplets on the teak, wet tiles with steam effects, spa ambiance with soft lighting, high-end bath products nearby, and plush white towels visible.

Shower Organizers and Caddies.prompt: Elegant shower setting with water droplets on glass doors, premium toiletries arranged nearby, wet tile background, spa-like atmosphere with warm ambient lighting.

Floating Wall Shelves.prompt: Mounted on textured luxury bathroom wall with marble countertop below, elegant decor items like candles or small plants, soft window lighting casting gentle shadows.

Storage Bins and Trays.prompt: Organized bathroom vanity or closet shelf with neatly folded white towels visible, marble surfaces, soft ambient lighting, clean spa atmosphere.

Storage.prompt: Luxury bathroom organization area with crisp white towels stacked nearby, marble flooring, soft vanity lighting, clean minimal aesthetic.

Floor Mats.prompt: Slight overhead angle on modern bathroom floor with wet footprints nearby, water droplets visible, clean white tile or natural stone flooring, bright natural lighting.

Waste Baskets and Hampers.prompt: Elegant bathroom or bedroom corner with folded linens visible, marble or hardwood flooring, soft ambient lighting, clean spa atmosphere with textured walls.

Waste Baskets and Hampers.prompt: Discreetly placed in upscale living room corner or bedroom, coordinating with modern decor, hardwood flooring, soft natural lighting, clean elegant aesthetic.

Bar and Counter Stools.prompt: Positioned at modern kitchen island or breakfast bar with marble or quartz countertop, pendant lighting overhead, bright airy kitchen atmosphere, contemporary design.

Benches.prompt: Beautiful garden patio or deck with lush greenery in background, natural wood deck or stone paving, warm golden hour sunlight, outdoor living atmosphere.
